case_title: EDWARD MICHAEL BURCH VS. LOYA CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: AMENDING OF CLAIM TO ADD DEFENDANT NICOLAS PEREZ FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURCH, EDWARD MICHAEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-25-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, NICOLAS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$60.00) SERVED DEC-17-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOYA CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-17-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-17-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT LOYA CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE ON THE AMENDED COMPLAINT. NICOLAS PEREZ NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LOYA CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-17-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE; SERVICE WAS UNTIMELY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BURCH, EDWARD MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT LOYA CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY PEREZ, NICOLAS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURCH, EDWARD MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, NICOLAS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,665.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST LOYA CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS NOT A PROPER PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2016 ORDERED DESTROYED

RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF CLAIM MAILED CERTIFIED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NO MAIL RECEPTICLE, UNABLE TO FORWARD
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LOYA CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO LOYA CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-17-2016 AT 3:30 PM.
